markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and align on Parloa's proposed content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Approved:** The 6-cluster content strategy was approved, pending CEO alignment on using the term "Conversational AI" for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [**Integrated Paid & Organic:** Highly competitive keywords (e.g., "Voice AI," KD 100) will be targeted with paid ads for immediate traffic while organic content builds long-term authority.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [**Competitive Gap:** Parloa's Domain Authority (DA 35) is close to Decagon's (DA 39), creating a direct opportunity to compete for high-value glossary terms.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [**Upcoming Actions:** Dora will seek CEO approval for Cluster 1 and share the strategy with the paid agency (Lionhurst) for alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)

## Topics

### Competitive Landscape Analysis

  - [Analysis of \~80k keywords across 6 competitors (Sierra AI, Cognigy, Decagon AI, Core AI, Poly AI, 11 Labs) informed the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**Key Competitor Insights:**](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [**Sierra AI:** Focuses on thought leadership via its high-profile founder.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [**Decagon AI:** Owns the glossary space; Parloa's similar DA creates a direct competition opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [**Cognigy:** Positions itself as the enterprise leader, leveraging Gartner recognition.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
      - [**Core AI:** Sets the standard for technical depth in content.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [**Paid vs. Organic Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
      - [For high-difficulty keywords (e.g., "Voice AI," KD 100), the strategy is to:](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
          - [**Paid:** Drive immediate traffic and conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
          - [**Organic:** Build long-term authority and interlink to paid landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
      - [This integrated approach ensures cost-effectiveness by avoiding paid spend on keywords where Parloa already ranks well organically.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

### Proposed Content Strategy (V1)

  - [The strategy is built on 6 topic clusters designed to address market gaps and Parloa's business needs.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**1. Conversational AI & Voice Tech**](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
      - [**Goal:** Establish Parloa as the trusted educator in conversational AI.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
      - [**Angle:** Position Parloa as voice-first, built from the ground up for quality, unlike chat-first competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
      - [**Status:** On Hold. Requires CEO approval to use the term "Conversational AI," which is critical for capturing high-volume searches (\~250k/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [**2. Agentic AI & Technical Leadership**](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
      - [**Goal:** Position Parloa at the forefront of agentic AI and demonstrate technical chops.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
      - [**Audience:** CX leaders, transformational AI leaders, and product teams.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [**3. Enterprise Contact Center Transformation**](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
      - [**Goal:** Position Parloa as the partner that scales AI from pilot to production.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
      - [**Angle:** Address the pain point of failed AI pilots by demonstrating expertise in enterprise deployment.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [**4. CX Operational Metrics & Glossary**](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture informational searches and own conversations around contact center operations.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [**Phase 1:** Create glossary-style articles.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
      - [**Phase 2:** Build a dedicated glossary page.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [**5. Industry Vertical Solutions**](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create high-intent content for specific industries (e.g., healthcare, insurance, retail).](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
      - [**Context:** Aligns with a planned roadmap for creating dedicated verticalization pages.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [**6. Competitive Comparisons & Alternatives**](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
      - [**Goal:** Own the middle-to-bottom-of-funnel conversation for prospects in the consideration phase.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
      - [**Context:** Two paid-only comparison pages (Sierra AI, Decagon AI) are launching next week. Organic versions will be needed to rank effectively, as paid pages are typically not SEO-optimized.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Dora:**](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
      - [Secure CEO approval for the "Conversational AI" topic cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
      - [Share the content strategy with the paid media agency (Lionhurst) for alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
      - [Schedule the product deep-dive for next Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
      - [Send questions for the deep-dive to Dora to consolidate with Lionhurst's questions.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=2072.0)
  - [**GrowthX.ai:**](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=1871.0)
      - [Deliver a calibration article in Week 3 to align on content quality and voice.](https://fathom.video/share/urzR7GRS8KMwCvgtEb3QrqDcNzuGiX69?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
